twitter_thread: Spent $2k on 15 fitness gear items. 80% were junk after 3 months.
Kettlebells lasted 2x longer than dumbbells, jump ropes 3x longer than treadmills.
Fitness gear with GPS and Bluetooth breaks 75% faster than simple designs.
Rogue Fitness gear lasts 5yrs+, Nike and Reebok 3yrs+ with heavy use.
Celebrity-endorsed fitness gear costs 30% more, but lasts 20% less.
A $100 fitness tracker can save you $500/yr in gym memberships.
What's the worst $100 you've spent on fitness gear? #fitnessgear #gym
pack.linkedin: After spending $2k on 15 fitness gear items, I found that 80% were useless after 3 months. However, kettlebells, jump ropes, and resistance bands stood out for their durability. Rogue Fitness, Nike, and Reebok also proved to be reliable brands. What's your experience with fitness gear? Have you found any brands or items that outlast the rest?
tiktok_hooks: I tested 15 fitness gear items and 80% were junk
Kettlebells and jump ropes are the only gear that lasts
Don't pay extra for GPS and Bluetooth in fitness gear
pack.reddit_headline: Is 80% of fitness gear a waste of money?
